title: WWE 'Raw': Roman Reigns, CM Punk get personal
fullText:
March 3 (UPI) -- The rivalry between World Heavyweight Champion CM Punk and Roman Reigns spilled over on WWE Raw as the two competitors prepare for their upcoming match at WrestleMania 42.
Reigns closed out the show on Monday where he was immediately interrupted by Punk. Reigns then launched into a war of words with Punk, referring to the champion as Phil, his real name.

"Phil, let's remind you real quick. We brought you back here to entertain the 30-40 year-old virgins that live with their mom and dad. We brought you back to sell a few t-shirts here and there," Reigns said in reference to Punk returning to WWE after a long absence in 2023.
"But we didn't bring you back to be champion. That's too much responsibility for you. That's too much power. That's above your pay grade," Reigns continued, before calling Punk a liar who complains backstage.

The Tribal Chief also threatened to put Punk on a John Cena retirement tour.
"You're going to retire me? You're going to retire CM Punk! Well, brother, you just made the list. You went from getting beat at WrestleMania to now I'm going to bury you," Punk said
"And then you won't be alone anymore because I'm going to bury you next to your father," Punk said as the audience gasped.

Reigns' late father is WWE Hall-of-Famer Sika, best known as one half of tag team the Wild Samoans with his older brother Afa.
Punk and Reigns collide for the World Heavyweight Championship at WrestleMania 42 in Las Vegas, which takes place over two nights on April 18 and April 19.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 John Cena of WWE attends the USA Network 2007 Upfront event in New York City on March 28, 2007. Photo by Monika Graff/UPI | License Photo Read More

summary: The rivalry between World Heavyweight Champion CM Punk and Roman Reigns spilled over on WWE "Raw" as the two grapplers prepare for "WrestleMania 42."
